description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a simple rectangular form and a gable roof. The exterior features a combination of dark and light siding, with the front and rear facades in black and the sides in white. Large, rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The house includes visible interior furnishings such as beds, tables, and plants, suggesting a comfortable residential environment. The roof is steeply pitched and made of metal panels, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. There is no visible porch or elaborate entryway, emphasizing clean lines and minimalism.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, dark and light siding, and large asymmetrical windows. The design is minimalist with visible interior furnishings and a sleek exterior.
description_view_0: The black facade features three windows, two on the lower level and one above, with visible interior furnishings including a bed and a table.
description_view_1: The white side wall displays a single small window and two large windows, revealing a bed and a railing inside, with the gable roof sloping above.
description_view_2: The rear white facade has three windows, including a large set on the lower level and two smaller ones above, with a plant visible inside.
description_view_3: The black side wall shows four windows, two on each level, with interior plants and furnishings visible, and a partial overhang at the roof edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway with no visible porch or decorative elements, likely a flush door integrated into the facade
